topics.label: Zoning reform
topics.description: Ending single-family-only zoning, upzoning near transit, reducing minimum lot sizes.

topics.label: Affordable housing funding
topics.description: Bonds, the housing trust fund, Bring Chicago Home / transfer-tax revenue, subsidies.

topics.label: Public housing / CHA
topics.description: Chicago Housing Authority redevelopment, vouchers, replacement units.

topics.label: Homelessness
topics.description: Encampments, shelter capacity, permanent supportive housing, migrant housing.

topics.label: Tenant protections
topics.description: Rent stabilization, eviction protections, just-cause, lifting the state rent-control ban.

topics.label: ADUs / coach houses
topics.description: Legalizing accessory dwelling units citywide beyond the pilot zones.

topics.label: Permitting & approvals
topics.description: Speeding permits, reducing parking minimums, aldermanic prerogative over developments.

topics.label: Property taxes & TIF
topics.description: Property-tax burden as it affects housing costs; TIF reform and redirection.

topics.label: Social / municipal housing
topics.description: City-owned or mixed-income social housing developers and green social housing.
